title: potentilla anserina subsp. egedii
intro: Potentilla anserina subsp. egedii, also known as Iceland dwarf cinquefoil, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Rosaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Potentilla anserina subsp. egedii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
